Subject: Inquiry Regarding Repair Status – Device [Model Number] – Ticket #[Reference Number]

Hey,

I am writing to formally inquire regarding the current status of the repair request submitted for my laptop, model [Insert Model], under ticket reference #[Insert Reference Number].

Could you please provide an update on the progress of the repair? If there have been any delays regarding parts availability or diagnostic assessments, I would appreciate knowing the expected timeline for completion. Additionally, if any further authorization or payment information is required to proceed, please let me know at your earliest convenience.

Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Repair Status – Device [Model Number] – Ticket #[Reference Number]

Hey,

I am writing to formally inquire regarding the current status of the repair request submitted for my laptop, model [Insert Model], under ticket reference #[Insert Reference Number].

Could you please provide an update on the progress of the repair? If there have been any delays regarding parts availability or diagnostic assessments, I would appreciate knowing the expected timeline for completion. Additionally, if any further authorization or payment information is required to proceed, please let me know at your earliest convenience.

Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
